channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Lamine Yamal waves Palestine flag as Barcelona celebrate La Liga win
item.description: Tens of thousands of Barcelona fans pack streets of Spanish city during open-top bus parade after league victory.

item.title: EU sanctions violent Israeli settlers after months of deadlock
item.description: The assets of violent Israeli settlers and settler organisations are being targeted in a new EU sanctions package.

item.title: Barcelona player Lamine Yamal waves Palestinian flag at parade
item.description: Barcelona player Lamine Yamal unfurled a Palestinian flag as the team paraded through the streets of Barcelona.

item.title: Rebranding Francafrique
item.description: France is trying to rebrand itself during a summit with African heads of states in Kenya.

item.title: Palestinians mark 78 years since Nakba amid ongoing displacement
item.description: 78 years of memory: Palestinians rally in Khan Yunis to mark the Nakba.

item.title: Could the latest violence in DR Congo undermine truce efforts?
item.description: Lesser-known armed groups have carried out a spate of attacks in the country's northeast.

item.title: South Africa plans presidential impeachment probe over ‘Farmgate’ scandal
item.description: The country's parliament says its speaker will begin the process of setting up the impeachment committee.

item.title: Trump says he will discuss arms sales to Taiwan in meeting with China’s Xi
item.description: US weapons sales to Taiwan have been longstanding source of tension with Beijing, which claims island as its territory.

item.title: EU agrees sanctions on Israeli West Bank settlers, Hamas leaders
item.description: The long-awaited agreement comes after Hungary's new government dropped the country's veto.

item.title: UK sanctions network accused of planning attacks for Iran
item.description: Britain freezes assets and travel for those accused of laundering billions and plotting Iranian-backed hostile activity.

item.title: Philippine senator flees ICC arrest over role in Duterte’s drug war
item.description: Senator Ronald Dela Rosa has evaded a drug war warrant against him.

item.title: Fan festivals, Panini, tickets: What are FIFA World Cup fans talking about?
item.description: From collectible shirts to broadcasting issues, here's what global football fans are discussing before World Cup 2026.

item.title: How impunity in Shireen Abu Akleh’s case fuels Israeli attacks on the press
item.description: Rights advocates say lack of accountability for killing of US citizen and Al Jazeera journalist enabled further abuses.

item.title: Trump says ceasefire is on ‘life support’ after rejecting Iran’s proposal
item.description: US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran was “on life support” after rejecting Tehran’s latest proposal.

item.title: Tragedy at sea: MV Hondius captain praises unity amid hantavirus outbreak.
item.description: For unity and strength, a thank you message from the captain of hantavirus-stricken ship.

item.title: US and French evacuees from Hantavirus-hit ship test positive
item.description: As passengers evacuate the hantavirus-hit MV Hondius cruise ship, a French woman and two US citizens tested positive.

item.title: Trump says ceasefire on ‘life support’, slams Iran response to US proposal
item.description: Efforts between Washington and Tehran to reach an agreement continue to fall short, fuelling concerns of return to war.

item.title: Israeli attacks kill at least four in southern Lebanon
item.description: Israeli strikes follow forced displacement warnings for nine towns in southern and eastern Lebanon.

item.title: Iran denies proposal sent to US contains ‘excessive demands’
item.description: Iran says Tehran’s response to the latest US proposal to end the war was “not excessive."

item.title: Who could challenge Keir Starmer for the UK PM’s job? Meet the candidates
item.description: The British prime minister has promised change as he battles to fend off leadership challenge.

item.title: Israeli killings in Lebanon rise: Is even the pretence of a ceasefire over?
item.description: Israel and Hezbollah have increased their attacks on each other, despite official ceasefire.

item.title: Iran war effect: Why is Modi asking Indians to avoid foreign trips, gold?
item.description: PM urges Indians to work from home and avoid foreign trips during the global energy crisis due to the Iran war.

item.title: Is the US empire in the middle of a long decline?
item.description: Iran war has put the US in a situation where ‘it’s not in control but can’t walk away’, argues economist Richard Wolff.

item.title: Lebanon Latest
item.description: Days of deadly attacks

item.title: Lebanese civil defence worker captures moment of Israeli strike
item.description: A Lebanese civil defence worker captured the moment an Israeli strike hit a rescue operation in southern Lebanon.
